brief: Customer CSV import of 100 livestock listings results in only 47 created. No error shown in the UI. 53 listings silently missing.

root_cause.description: Raw GraphQL EPD mutation (createEPDProfile) omits the 'owner' field required by AppSync owner-based authorization. Amplify client auto-injects owner; raw client.graphql() calls do not.
root_cause.mechanism: AppSync owner-auth rejects mutations that lack the 'owner' field; raw GraphQL bypass skips Amplify's auto-injection

required_findings.description: Agent must identify EPD profile creation as the failing subsystem
Agent must identify AppSync owner-based authorization as the mechanism
Agent must identify that raw GraphQL bypasses Amplify's owner field injection
Agent must identify the missing 'owner' field in the mutation input as the exact cause

anti_patterns.description: Root cause is authorization, not a network connectivity issue
CSV parsing succeeds for all 100 rows; the failure is in the GraphQL mutation
User is authenticated; the issue is authorization on a specific mutation, not authentication

multi_cause_note: Secondary issue: 6 REGISTERED_HEIFER listings may have EPD data silently omitted due to sanitization. A score-4 investigation will note both causes.
notes: The 53 failed listings are exclusively BULL type (which use the EPD code path). The 47 successful ones are non-EPD animal types.
